        Privacy Policy & Terms

        Before creating your Atwe account, please review how we handle your information and the rules for using Atwe.

        What we collect. Your name, email, username, password (stored only as a secure hash), optional photo and date of birth, the content you post, your messages, the AI conversations you have, and basic usage data.

        How we use it. To run the Service, power AI replies, messaging, calls and live streams, secure your account, send account emails, and prevent abuse.

        Who we share with. Only trusted providers that host our servers, deliver email, process payments, power AI responses, and relay calls and live streams. We never sell your data.

        Your content & control. Your public posts are visible to others; direct messages stay private to their participants. You choose who can contact and call you, you can block anyone, and you can delete your full history at any time.

        The rules. You must be 18 or older, keep your account secure, only post content you have the right to share, and never harass, impersonate, spam, or break the law. We may remove content or suspend accounts that break these rules.

        AI. AI responses are generated automatically and may be inaccurate — don't rely on them as professional advice.

        Read the full Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

        By tapping I agree, you confirm you are 18 or older and accept the Atwe Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

        Silence unknown callers

        Use your activity to tailor your For You feed

        How you sign in
        Email & password
        App lock
        Require a passcode to open Atwe on this device
        App lock is stored on this device only. If you forget the passcode, sign out and back in to reset it.
        Locked sections use the same passcode as App lock — turning one on will ask you to set a passcode first if you haven't already.
        Push notifications
        Get alerts even when Atwe is closed
        Push notifications arrive on this device even when the app is closed. While a tab is open you’ll always get live in-app alerts.
        Quiet hours
        Do not disturb
        Mute notification alerts during set hours
        From
        To
        During quiet hours you won’t be alerted — messages and notifications still arrive, you’ll just see them when you open the app. Uses this device’s clock.
        Notify me about
        Loading…
        Choose which activity sends you a notification. Messages, payments and requests always notify you.
        Mute notifications from
        Loading…
        Quality filters hide notifications from accounts matching these. They never affect people you follow.
        Atwe Premium widens your AI replies and unlocks the verified badge. Creator tools let your followers support you directly.

        Accent colour
        Pick any colour for buttons, links & highlights across the app.
        Larger text
        Increase text size across the app
        Reduce motion
        Minimise animations & transitions
        Appearance settings are saved on this device.

        Your chat is private

        Encrypted in transit. Messages are sent over an encrypted (HTTPS) connection between your device and Atwe, and are only shown to you and the people in this chat.

        Not end-to-end encrypted. Unlike some apps, Atwe stores your messages on its servers so your chat history syncs across your devices and you never lose it. We never sell your messages or use them to target ads.

        You're in control. Extra protection is built in: block & report, disappearing messages, view-once media, locked chats, and your privacy settings.

        Profile strength

        Quotes & estimates
        Make an offer
        Add a product
        ＋ Add a photo
        Guests pick dates and request to book. You confirm, then they pay from their Atwe balance. Add amenities & details below (Wi-Fi, bedrooms…).
        ⚡ Sent to the buyer instantly when they pay — in their chat and on the order. Only they can see it.
        Options
        Add sizes, colours or styles — each can have its own price and stock. Leave a price blank to use the main price.
        Free shipping
        Buyers pay this flat fee per order. Use it to cover postage (USPS/UPS/FedEx), or keep shipping free.
        Offer local pickup
        Buyers can choose to collect in person (free, no shipping address).
        Offer Subscribe & Save
        Buyers can subscribe for recurring delivery and save this % on every order. Paid automatically from their Atwe balance.
        Your cart
        Orders
        Add to your story
        ＋ Add a photo or video
        Close friends
        Only these people see a story you share to close friends. They’re never told they’re on the list.
        Your close friends
        Add to highlight
        Save this story to a highlight on your profile — it stays even after the story disappears.
        Or add to an existing one
        Edit highlight
        Quick replies
        Tap a saved reply to drop it into the message box. Great for FAQs, hours, pricing.
        Auto-messages
        Automatically reply to customers — a one-time greeting for new or long-absent contacts, and an away message while you can't reply personally.
        Greeting message
        Send a greeting
        Once to a new customer, or after 14 days of no chat
        Away message
        Currently away
        Auto-reply while you can't respond personally
        When to send
        Whenever away is on
        Set your open hours in your business profile — the away message will only send when you're closed.

        You already have a conversation. Continue it, or start a separate new one?
        Conversations
        You have a few separate chats with this person. Pick one to continue.
        Write with Atwe AI
        Pick a reply — Atwe AI read the recent messages. Tap one to drop it in the composer (you can still edit it).
        New document
        Document
        Sketch
        Open a dispute
        Tell us what went wrong. Atwe will review and either refund the buyer or release the funds to the seller.
        Request a return
        Tell the seller why you’re returning it. If they approve, you’re refunded the order total.
        Gift cards
        Buy store credit. Redeeming a card adds it to the wallet balance.
        Delivery
        Enter a gift-card code to add it to your balance.
        Your gift cards
        Atwe Card
        Tap the card to flip
        One card, powered by your Atwe balance.
        Spend your wallet balance anywhere, top up instantly and see every transaction in the app. The Atwe Card is coming soon — join the waiting list and we’ll notify you the moment it’s here.
        • Spend your Atwe balance anywhere cards are accepted
        • Instant top-ups & transfers from your wallet
        • Real-time transaction alerts
        • No monthly fees
        Where should we reach you?
        We’ll only email you about the Atwe Card — no spam, ever.
        You’re on the waiting list 🎉
        We’ll notify you at the moment the Atwe Card is here.
        Move to wallet balance
        Move money from this gift card into your main wallet balance. The gift card balance drops by what you move. Available: $0.00.
        Payment links
        Create a “pay me” link to share anywhere. People pay you from their wallet balance.
        Your links
        Marketplace
        Sponsored ads
        Pay per click to win a "Sponsored" slot at the top of marketplace search — you're only ever charged what it took to beat the next-best bid, never your full max.
        Sponsor a listing
        Max cost per click
        Daily budget
        Keywords (optional — blank auto-targets any relevant search)
        Saved searches
        Get notified when a new listing matches. We’ll also alert you if a saved item’s price drops.

        Ask Atwe AI to create an event, send an invoice, schedule a post, or draft a reply. You’ll confirm before anything happens.

        Showcases
        Work, products and projects people are showing off.
        Selling
        Sell an item or a service. It shows up in the Marketplace and in search.
        Business dashboard
        Everything you run — requests, orders and bookings in one place.
        Manage store
        Your storefront, products, coupons and orders — all in one place.
        Bundles
        Group several products into one saver price. Buyers get the whole set in a single order.
        New bundle
        ＋ Bundle photo (optional)
        Products in this bundle
        Pick 2 or more of your own products. Set how many of each. Items with options aren't supported yet.
        Subscriptions
        Recurring deliveries, billed from your Atwe balance. Pause, change frequency or cancel anytime.
        Scheduled payments
        Schedule a payment
        Repeat automatically
        Payment date
        Paid automatically from your Atwe balance. We’ll retry if your balance is short, and pause after a few misses.
        Ads Manager
        Your sponsored ads, promoted posts and boosted jobs — and how they’re performing.
        Advertise on Atwe
        Run a sponsored ad in the feed that links to your website. Add your creative, we review it, then you pay to publish.
        Affiliation badge
        A small logo next to your verified check showing who you’re affiliated with. Tapping it opens their profile.
        Bookings
        Upload a badge
        A small square logo (your company / organization). We’ll review it before it appears next to your check.
        ✦ Shop with Atwe AI
        Describe what you want in your own words — Atwe finds it for you.
        Split a bill
        New split
        Split equally between you and the people you add. (Your own share isn’t collected.)
        Invite friends
        Share your code — you and your friend each get a wallet bonus when they join.
        Help & refunds
        Charged by mistake or something went wrong? Pick the payment and request a refund — our team reviews every request.
        Get a premium handle
        Some short or in-demand @handles can be claimed for a one-time price, paid from your wallet balance. Check one below.
        Handle
        Your QR code
        Scan a code
        ⚠️ Only scan a QR from Atwe’s own login screen, on a device you own. Linking signs that device in to your account.
